main.description: A court case/docket. The repo identity IS the case; this self-keyed record carries case-level metadata (analogous to an actor profile).

court.description: Court identifier, e.g. CourtListener court id 'mdd'.

courtName.description: Human-readable court, e.g. 'U.S. District Court, District of Maryland'.

source.description: Provenance pointer to the upstream record this was mirrored from.

providerDocketId.description: Upstream's stable id for this docket.

retrievedAt.description: When Cranch observed this content (witness timestamp).
